items.name: Mediterranean Toast
items.description: Embark on a flavor adventure with our tantalizing Sourdough Toasted Sandwich. Grilled babaganush, roasted eggplant bits, and creamy feta cheese unite on toasted sourdough, harmonizing beautifully with a drizzle of golden honey. Prepare your taste buds for a symphony of smoky, roasted, tangy, and sweet sensations in every heavenly bite. Satisfaction awaits in this exquisite fusion of Mediterranean-inspired ingredients.

items.name: The 16th Ave Sandwich
items.description: 2 sliced hard-boiled eggs on toasted sourdough bread with mayo, lettuce, tomato, & American cheese.

items.name: Custom Gift Box
items.description: Get ready to impress! Wrap it up in style and make it the perfect gift.  Add your item to the shopping cart & add this gift box. The store will have your order wrapped up for you. *NOTE* The box might fit up to 5-6 items depending on the size of the items. Drinks do NOT go in the box. If not all the items fit, we will send them along in a Hot Bagels Bag

items.name: Gift Box For 1-2 PPL
items.description:
Includes: 2 bagels, scoop of 3 spreads: tuna, cream cheese, & egg salad, farina, chopped salad, 2 homemade blintzes, muffin, fresh orange juice, in-house-made iced cappuccino.
Beautifully packaged in a Hot Bagels gift box.

items.name: Gift Box For 2
items.description:
Includes: 3 bagels, scoop of 4 spreads: tuna, cream cheese, guacamole, & egg salad, farina, 2 salads, 2 homemade blintzes, 2 muffins, 1 slice cheesecake, fresh orange juice, in-house-made iced cappuccino.
Beautifully packaged in a Hot Bagels gift box.

items.name: Hot Lunch For 1
items.description: Includes a choice of pasta, a specialty salad, soup, a creamy specialty dessert, and a hot drink. Beautifully packaged in a Hot Bagels Gift Box.

modifier_groups.name: Choice of Hot or Cold Drink

items.name: Hot Lunch For 2
items.description: Includes three bagels, three scoops of spread, a choice of pasta, a choice of Chef's Specialties Sandwiches, a choice of a side, chopped Israeli salad, a choice of two soups, two creamy specialty desserts, and two hot drinks. Beautifully packaged in a Hot Bagels Gift Box.

modifier_groups.name: Choice of Two Hot or Cold Drinks

items.name: Shabbos Gift Box Large
items.description: Enhance that special person's Shabbos. Send them our Shabbos gift box, which includes one Shabbos sourdough challah, one small Shabbos sourdough challah, one in-house herb mayo dip, and one in-house garlic confit dip, all in a rustic gift box.

items.name: Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Shake
items.description: Indulge in our luxurious Chocolate Dubai Shake, a rich and creamy blend of dark chocolate and pistachio flavors, topped with a Creamy whip cream This Middle Eastern-inspired drink combines the crunch of toasted pistachios with the smoothness of dark chocolate, creating a delightful harmony of textures and flavors. The chocolate ice cream adds a cool and creamy contrast, making this drink a perfect treat for chocolate lovers and those seeking a unique flavor experience.
